# datadog_scorecard_rule (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about an existing Datadog scorecard rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datadog_scorecard_rule" "example" {
  id = "q8MQxk8TCqrHnWkx"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the scorecard rule.

### Read-Only

- `custom` (Boolean) Whether the rule is a custom rule.
- `description` (String) Description of the rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the rule is enabled.
- `level` (String) The maturity level of the rule.
- `name` (String) Name of the rule.
- `owner` (String) Owner of the rule.
- `scorecard_name` (String) Name of the scorecard this rule belongs to.
